tEn: CoCa: Contrastive Captioners are Image-Text Foundation Models
tZh: CoCa: 对比字幕器是图像-文本基础模型
sEn: CoCa jointly pretrains an image-text encoder-decoder with contrastive and captioning losses, achieving SOTA on diverse tasks.
sZh: CoCa通过对比损失和字幕损失联合预训练图像-文本编码器-解码器，在多种任务上达到最先进水平。
absEn: Exploring large-scale pretrained foundation models is of significant interest in computer vision because these models can be quickly transferred to many downstream tasks. This paper presents Contrastive Captioner (CoCa), a minimalist design to pretrain an image-text encoder-decoder foundation model jointly with contrastive loss and captioning loss, thereby subsuming model capabilities from contrastive approaches like CLIP and generative methods like SimVLM. In contrast to standard encoder-decoder transformers where all decoder layers attend to encoder outputs, CoCa omits cross-attention in the first half of decoder layers to encode unimodal text representations, and cascades the remaining decoder layers which cross-attend to the image encoder for multimodal image-text representations. We apply a contrastive loss between unimodal image and text embeddings, in addition to a captioning loss on the multimodal decoder outputs which predicts text tokens autoregressively. By sharing the same computational graph, the two training objectives are computed efficiently with minimal overhead. CoCa is pretrained end-to-end and from scratch on both web-scale alt-text data and annotated images by treating all labels simply as text, seamlessly unifying natural language supervision for representation learning. Empirically, CoCa achieves state-of-the-art performance with zero-shot transfer or minimal task-specific adaptation on a broad range of downstream tasks, spanning visual recognition (ImageNet, Kinetics-400/600/700, Moments-in-Time), crossmodal retrieval (MSCOCO, Flickr30K, MSR-VTT), multimodal understanding (VQA, SNLI-VE, NLVR2), and image captioning (MSCOCO, NoCaps). Notably on ImageNet classification, CoCa obtains 86.3% zero-shot top-1 accuracy, 90.6% with a frozen encoder and learned classification head, and new state-of-the-art 91.0% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet with a finetuned encoder.
absZh: 探索大规模预训练基础模型在计算机视觉中具有重要意义，因为这些模型可以快速迁移到许多下游任务。本文提出了对比字幕器（CoCa），一种极简设计，通过对比损失和字幕损失联合预训练图像-文本编码器-解码器基础模型，从而融合了CLIP等对比方法和SimVLM等生成方法的模型能力。与标准编码器-解码器变换器（所有解码器层都关注编码器输出）不同，CoCa在前半部分解码器层中省略了交叉注意力以编码单模态文本表示，并级联剩余的解码器层，这些层交叉关注图像编码器以获取多模态图像-文本表示。我们在单模态图像和文本嵌入之间应用对比损失，此外在多模态解码器输出上应用字幕损失，以自回归方式预测文本标记。通过共享相同的计算图，两个训练目标以最小开销高效计算。CoCa在网页规模的替代文本数据和标注图像上从头到尾进行预训练，将所有标签简单地视为文本，无缝统一自然语言监督以进行表示学习。实验表明，CoCa在广泛的下游任务上通过零样本迁移或最小任务特定适应实现了最先进的性能，涵盖视觉识别（ImageNet、Kinetics-400/600/700、Moments-in-Time）、跨模态检索（MSCOCO、Flickr30K、MSR-VTT）、多模态理解（VQA、SNLI-VE、NLVR2）和图像字幕（MSCOCO、NoCaps）。值得注意的是，在ImageNet分类上，CoCa获得了86.3%的零样本top-1准确率，使用冻结编码器和学习分类头时达到90.6%，以及使用微调编码器时达到新的最先进91.0% top-1准确率。

contrib.en: Proposes Contrastive Captioner (CoCa), a minimalist encoder-decoder foundation model unifying contrastive and captioning losses.
contrib.zh: 提出对比描述器（CoCa），一种极简的编码器-解码器基础模型，统一了对比损失和描述损失。

contrib.en: Decouples decoder into unimodal and multimodal layers, enabling both aligned unimodal embeddings and fused multimodal representations.
contrib.zh: 将解码器解耦为单模态和多模态层，同时支持对齐的单模态嵌入和融合的多模态表示。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on ImageNet (86.3%), crossmodal retrieval, and multimodal understanding tasks.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet（86.3%）、跨模态检索和多模态理解任务上取得最先进的零样本性能。

contrib.en: Pretrains end-to-end from scratch on web-scale alt-text and annotated images, treating all labels as text.
contrib.zh: 从零开始在网络规模的替代文本和标注图像上进行端到端预训练，将所有标签视为文本。

contrib.en: Introduces task-specific attentional poolers to customize visual representations for different objectives and downstream tasks.
contrib.zh: 引入任务特定的注意力池化器，为不同目标和下游任务定制视觉表示。

contrib.en: Sets new state-of-the-art on ImageNet finetuning (91.0%) and NoCaps captioning (120.6 CIDEr).
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet微调（91.0%）和NoCaps描述（120.6 CIDEr）上取得新的最先进结果。

limits.en: Model performance depends on large-scale pretraining data (JFT-3B, ALIGN), which may contain biases.
limits.zh: 模型性能依赖于大规模预训练数据（JFT-3B、ALIGN），这些数据可能包含偏见。

limits.en: Zero-shot evaluation may not reflect robustness to all real-world image corruptions beyond current benchmarks.
limits.zh: 零样本评估可能无法反映对当前基准之外的所有真实世界图像损坏的鲁棒性。

limits.en: Requires significant computational resources (2048 TPUv4 chips for 5 days) for pretraining.
limits.zh: 预训练需要大量计算资源（2048个TPUv4芯片运行5天）。

limits.en: Decoder design with causal masking limits parallelization for some tasks compared to bidirectional models.
limits.zh: 与双向模型相比，解码器的因果掩码设计限制了某些任务的并行化。

limits.en: Broader impacts such as fairness, social bias, and potential misuse require further community exploration.
limits.zh: 公平性、社会偏见和潜在滥用等更广泛的影响需要社区进一步探索。

In contrast to standard encoder-decoder transformers where all decoder layers attend to encoder outputs, CoCa omits cross-attention in the first half of decoder layers to encode unimodal text representations, and cascades the remaining decoder layers which cross-attend to the image encoder for multimodal image-text representations. We apply a contrastive loss between unimodal image and text embeddings, in addition to a captioning loss on the multimodal decoder outputs which predicts text tokens autoregressively. Empirically, CoCa achieves state-of-the-art performance with zero-shot transfer or minimal task-specific adaptation on a broad range of downstream tasks, spanning visual recognition (ImageNet, Kinetics-400/600/700, Moments-in-Time), crossmodal retrieval (MSCOCO, Flickr30K, MSR-VTT), multimodal understanding (VQA, SNLI-VE, NLVR2), and image captioning (MSCOCO, NoCaps). items.zh: 探索大规模预训练基础模型在计算机视觉领域具有重要意义，因为这些模型可以快速迁移到许多下游任务。本文提出对比描述器（CoCa），这是一种极简设计，通过联合使用对比损失和描述损失来预训练图像-文本编码器-解码器基础模型，从而融合了对比方法（如CLIP）和生成方法（如SimVLM）的模型能力。与标准编码器-解码器Transformer中所有解码器层都关注编码器输出不同，CoCa在前一半解码器层中省略交叉注意力以编码单模态文本表示，并将剩余的解码器层级联起来，这些层通过交叉注意力关注图像编码器以获取多模态图像-文本表示。我们在单模态图像和文本嵌入之间应用对比损失，此外还在多模态解码器输出上应用描述损失，该损失以自回归方式预测文本词元。通过共享相同的计算图，这两个训练目标可以高效计算，开销极小。CoCa在网页规模的替代文本数据和标注图像上从头到尾进行端到端预训练，将所有标签简单地视为文本，从而无缝统一了用于表示学习的自然语言监督。实验上，CoCa在广泛的下游任务上通过零样本迁移或最少的任务特定微调取得了最先进的性能，这些任务涵盖视觉识别（ImageNet、Kinetics-400/600/700、Moments-in-Time）、跨模态检索（MSCOCO、Flickr30K、MSR-VTT）、多模态理解（VQA、SNLI-VE、NLVR2）和图像描述（MSCOCO、NoCaps）。值得注意的是，在ImageNet分类上，CoCa取得了86.3%的零样本top-1准确率，使用冻结编码器和学习分类头时达到90.6%，以及通过微调编码器在ImageNet上取得了新的最先进91.0%的top-1准确率。

items.en: Deep learning has recently witnessed the rise of foundation language models [1] such as BERT [2], T5 [3], GPT-3 [4], where models are pretrained on web-scale data and demonstrate generic multi-tasking capabilities through zero-shot, few-shot or transfer learning. Compared with specialized individual models, pretraining foundation models for massive downstream tasks can amortize training costs, providing opportunities to push the limits of model scale [5] for human-level intelligence.
items.zh: 深度学习最近见证了基础语言模型[1]的兴起，如BERT[2]、T5[3]、GPT-3[4]，这些模型在网页规模数据上预训练，并通过零样本、少样本或迁移学习展现出通用的多任务能力。与专门的个体模型相比，为大量下游任务预训练基础模型可以分摊训练成本，从而为人类级智能推动模型规模[5]的极限提供机会。

items.en: For vision and vision-language problems, several foundation model candidates have been explored: (1) Pioneering works [6, 7, 8] have shown the effectiveness of single-encoder models pretrained with cross-entropy loss on image classification datasets such as ImageNet [9]. The image encoder provides generic visual representations that can be adapted for various downstream tasks including image and video understanding [10, 11]. However, these models rely heavily on image annotations as labeled vectors and do not bake in knowledge of free-form human natural language, hindering their application to downstream tasks that involving both vision and language modalities. (2) Recently, a line of research [12, 13, 14] has shown the feasibility of image-text foundation model candidates by pretraining two parallel encoders with a contrastive loss on web-scale noisy image-text pairs. In addition to the visual embeddings for vision-only tasks, the resulting dual-encoder models can additionally encode textual embeddings to the same latent space, enabling new crossmodal alignment capabilities such as zero-shot image classification and image-text retrieval. Nonetheless, these models are not directly applicable for joint vision-language understanding tasks such as visual question answering (VQA), due to missing joint components to learn fused image and text representations. (3) Another line of research [15, 16, 17] has explored generative pretraining with encoder-decoder models to learn generic vision and multimodal representations. During pretraining, the model takes images on the encoder side and applies Language Modeling (LM) loss (or PrefixLM [3, 16]) on the decoder outputs. For downstream tasks, the decoder outputs can then be used as joint representations for multimodal understanding tasks. While superior vision-language results [16] have been attained with pretrained encoder-decoder models, they do not produce text-only representations aligned with image embeddings, thereby being less feasible and efficient for crossmodal alignment tasks.
items.zh: 对于视觉和视觉-语言问题，已经探索了几种基础模型候选：（1）开创性工作[6,7,8]展示了在ImageNet[9]等图像分类数据集上使用交叉熵损失预训练的单编码器模型的有效性。图像编码器提供了通用的视觉表示，可适应各种下游任务，包括图像和视频理解[10,11]。然而，这些模型严重依赖作为标注向量的图像标注，并未融入自由形式的人类自然语言知识，阻碍了它们应用于涉及视觉和语言模态的下游任务。（2）最近，一系列研究[12,13,14]通过在网页规模噪声图像-文本对上使用对比损失预训练两个并行编码器，展示了图像-文本基础模型候选的可行性。除了用于纯视觉任务的视觉嵌入外，得到的双编码器模型还可以将文本嵌入编码到相同的潜在空间，从而实现了新的跨模态对齐能力，如零样本图像分类和图像-文本检索。尽管如此，这些模型不能直接应用于联合视觉-语言理解任务，如视觉问答（VQA），因为缺少学习融合图像和文本表示的联合组件。（3）另一系列研究[15,16,17]探索了使用编码器-解码器模型进行生成式预训练，以学习通用的视觉和多模态表示。在预训练期间，模型在编码器端接收图像，并在解码器输出上应用语言建模（LM）损失（或PrefixLM[3,16]）。对于下游任务，解码器输出可用作多模态理解任务的联合表示。虽然预训练的编码器-解码器模型取得了优越的视觉-语言结果[16]，但它们不产生与图像嵌入对齐的纯文本表示，因此对于跨模态对齐任务不太可行和高效。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Overview of Contrastive Captioners (CoCa) pretraining as image-text foundation models. The pretrained CoCa can be used for downstream tasks including visual recognition, vision-language alignment, image captioning and multimodal understanding with zero-shot transfer, frozen-feature evaluation or end-to-end finetuning.
items.capZh: 图1：对比描述器（CoCa）预训练作为图像-文本基础模型的概览。预训练的CoCa可用于下游任务，包括视觉识别、视觉-语言对齐、图像描述和多模态理解，通过零样本迁移、冻结特征评估或端到端微调。

items.en: In this work, we unify single-encoder, dual-encoder and encoder-decoder paradigms, and train one image-text foundation model that subsumes the capabilities of all three approaches. We propose a simple model family named Contrastive Captioners (CoCa) with a modified encoder-decoder architecture trained with both contrastive loss and captioning (generative) loss. As shown in Figure 1, we decouple the decoder transformer into two parts, a unimodal decoder and a multimodal decoder. We omit cross-attention in unimodal decoder layers to encode text-only representations, and cascade multimodal decoder layers cross-attending to image encoder outputs to learn multimodal image-text representations. We apply both the contrastive objective between outputs of the image encoder and unimodal text decoder, and the captioning objective at the output of the multimodal decoder. Furthermore, CoCa is trained on both image annotation data and noisy image-text data by treating all labels simply as text. The generative loss on image annotation text provides a fine-grained training signal similar to the single-encoder cross-entropy loss approach, effectively subsuming all three pretraining paradigms into a single unified method.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们统一了单编码器、双编码器和编码器-解码器范式，并训练了一个图像-文本基础模型，该模型融合了所有三种方法的能力。我们提出了一个简单的模型家族，名为对比描述器（CoCa），采用修改后的编码器-解码器架构，同时使用对比损失和描述（生成）损失进行训练。如图1所示，我们将解码器Transformer解耦为两部分：单模态解码器和多模态解码器。我们在单模态解码器层中省略交叉注意力以编码纯文本表示，并将多模态解码器层级联起来，这些层通过交叉注意力关注图像编码器输出以学习多模态图像-文本表示。我们在图像编码器和单模态文本解码器的输出之间应用对比目标，并在多模态解码器的输出处应用描述目标。此外，CoCa在图像标注数据和噪声图像-文本数据上训练，将所有标签简单地视为文本。图像标注文本上的生成损失提供了类似于单编码器交叉熵损失方法的细粒度训练信号，有效地将所有三种预训练范式统一为单一方法。

items.en: The design of CoCa leverages contrastive learning for learning global representations and captioning for fine-grained region-level features, thereby benefiting tasks across all three categories shown in Figure 1. CoCa shows that a single pretrained model can outperform many specialized models using zero-shot transfer or minimal task-specific adaptation. For example, CoCa obtains 86.3% zero-shot accuracy on ImageNet and better zero-shot crossmodal retrieval on MSCOCO and Flickr30k. With a frozen-encoder, CoCa achieves 90.6% on ImageNet classification, 88.0%/88.5%/81.1% on Kinetics-40/600/700 and 47.4% on Moments-in-Time. After lightweight finetuning, CoCa further achieves 91.0% on ImageNet, 82.3% on VQA and 120.6 CIDEr score on NoCaps.
items.zh: CoCa的设计利用对比学习学习全局表示，利用描述学习细粒度区域级特征，从而有益于图1所示的所有三类任务。CoCa表明，单个预训练模型可以通过零样本迁移或最少的任务特定微调超越许多专门模型。例如，CoCa在ImageNet上获得86.3%的零样本准确率，在MSCOCO和Flickr30k上获得更好的零样本跨模态检索。使用冻结编码器，CoCa在ImageNet分类上达到90.6%，在Kinetics-40/600/700上达到88.0%/88.5%/81.1%，在Moments-in-Time上达到47.4%。经过轻量级微调后，CoCa在ImageNet上进一步达到91.0%，在VQA上达到82.3%，在NoCaps上达到120.6 CIDEr分数。

items.en: Vision Pretraining. Pretraining ConvNets [18] or Transformers [19] on large-scale annotated data such as ImageNet [6, 7, 8], Instagram [20] or JFT [21] has become a popular strategy towards solving visual recognition problems including classification, localization, segmentation, video recognition, tracking and many other problems. Recently, self-supervised pretraining approaches have also been explored. BEiT [22] proposes a masked image modeling task following BERT [2] in natural language processing, and uses quantized visual token ids as prediction targets. MAE [23] and SimMIM [24] remove the need for an image tokenizer and directly use a light-weight decoder or projection layer to regress pixel values. Nonetheless, these methods only learn models for the vision modality and thus they are not applicable to tasks that require joint reasoning over both image and text inputs.
items.zh: 视觉预训练。在大型标注数据（如ImageNet[6,7,8]、Instagram[20]或JFT[21]）上预训练ConvNets[18]或Transformer[19]已成为解决视觉识别问题（包括分类、定位、分割、视频识别、跟踪等许多问题）的流行策略。最近，自监督预训练方法也得到了探索。BEiT[22]提出了一种掩码图像建模任务，遵循自然语言处理中的BERT[2]，并使用量化的视觉词元ID作为预测目标。MAE[23]和SimMIM[24]去除了图像分词器的需求，直接使用轻量级解码器或投影层回归像素值。尽管如此，这些方法仅学习视觉模态的模型，因此不适用于需要对图像和文本输入进行联合推理的任务。

items.en: Vision-Language Pretraining. In recent years, rapid progress has been made in vision-language pretraining (VLP), which aims to jointly encode vision and language in a fusion model. Early work (e.g. LXMERT [25], UNITER [26], VinVL [27]) in this direction relies on pretrained object detection modules such as Fast(er) R-CNN [28] to extract visual representations. Later efforts such as ViLT [29] and VLMo [30] unify vision and language transformers, and train a multimodal transformer from scratch.
items.zh: 视觉-语言预训练。近年来，视觉-语言预训练（VLP）取得了快速进展，其目标是在融合模型中联合编码视觉和语言。早期工作（例如LXMERT[25]、UNITER[26]、VinVL[27]）依赖预训练的目标检测模块（如Fast(er) R-CNN[28]）来提取视觉表示。后来的努力，如ViLT[29]和VLMo[30]，统一了视觉和语言Transformer，并从零开始训练多模态Transformer。

items.en: Image-Text Foundation Models. Recent work has proposed image-text foundation models that can subsume both vision and vision-language pretraining. CLIP [12] and ALIGN [13] demonstrate that dual-encoder models pretrained with contrastive objectives on noisy image-text pairs can learn strong image and text representations for crossmodal alignment tasks and zero-shot image classification. Florence [14] further develops this method with unified contrastive objective [31], training foundation models that can be adapted for a wide range of vision and image-text benchmarks. To further improve zero-shot image classification accuracy, LiT [32] and BASIC [33] first pretrain model on an large-scale image annotation dataset with cross-entropy and further finetune with contrastive loss on an noisy alt-text image dataset. Another line of research [16, 17, 34] proposes encoder-decoder models trained with generative losses and shows strong results in vision-language benchmarks while the visual encoder still performs competitively on image classification. In this work, we focus on training an image-text foundation model from scratch in a single pretraining stage to unify these approaches. While recent works [35, 36, 37] have also explored image-text unification, they require multiple pretraining stages of unimodal and multimodal modules to attain good performance. For example, ALBEF [36] combines contrastive loss with masked language modelling (MLM) with a dual-encoder design. However, our approach is simpler and more efficient to train while also enables more model capabilities: (1) CoCa only performs one forward and backward propagation for a batch of image-text pairs while ALBEF requires two (one on corrupted inputs and another without corruption), (2) CoCa is trained from scratch on the two objectives only while ALBEF is initialized from pretrained visual and textual encoders with additional training signals including momentum modules. (3) The decoder architecture with generative loss is preferred for natural language generation and thus directly enables image captioning and zero-shot learning [16].
items.zh: 图像-文本基础模型。最近的工作提出了图像-文本基础模型，可以融合视觉和视觉-语言预训练。CLIP[12]和ALIGN[13]证明，在噪声图像-文本对上使用对比目标预训练的双编码器模型可以学习强大的图像和文本表示，用于跨模态对齐任务和零样本图像分类。Florence[14]进一步使用统一对比目标[31]开发了这种方法，训练可适应广泛视觉和图像-文本基准的基础模型。为了进一步提高零样本图像分类准确率，LiT[32]和BASIC[33]首先在大型图像标注数据集上使用交叉熵预训练模型，然后在噪声替代文本图像数据集上使用对比损失进一步微调。另一系列研究[16,17,34]提出了使用生成损失训练的编码器-解码器模型，在视觉-语言基准上显示出强劲结果，同时视觉编码器在图像分类上仍具有竞争力。在这项工作中，我们专注于在单个预训练阶段从零开始训练图像-文本基础模型，以统一这些方法。虽然最近的工作[35,36,37]也探索了图像-文本统一，但它们需要多个预训练阶段的单模态和多模态模块才能获得良好性能。例如，ALBEF[36]结合了对比损失与掩码语言建模（MLM），采用双编码器设计。然而，我们的方法更简单、训练更高效，同时还能实现更多模型能力：（1）CoCa仅对一批图像-文本对执行一次前向和反向传播，而ALBEF需要两次（一次在损坏输入上，另一次在无损坏输入上）；（2）CoCa仅在这两个目标上从零开始训练，而ALBEF从预训练的视觉和文本编码器初始化，并带有额外的训练信号，包括动量模块。（3）具有生成损失的解码器架构更适用于自然语言生成，因此直接支持图像描述和零样本学习[16]。

items.en: We begin with a review of three foundation model families that utilize natural language supervision differently: single-encoder classification pretraining, dual-encoder contrastive learning, and encoder-decoder image captioning. We then introduce Contrastive Captioners (CoCa) that share the merits of both contrastive learning and image-to-caption generation under a simple architecture. We further discuss how CoCa models can quickly transfer to downstream tasks with zero-shot transfer or minimal task adaptation.
items.zh: 我们首先回顾三种基础模型家族，它们以不同方式利用自然语言监督：单编码器分类预训练、双编码器对比学习和编码器-解码器图像描述。然后，我们介绍对比描述器（CoCa），它在简单架构下兼具对比学习和图像到描述生成的优点。我们进一步讨论CoCa模型如何通过零样本迁移或最少的任务适应快速迁移到下游任务。

items.en: Single-Encoder Classification. The classic single-encoder approach pretrains a visual encoder through image classification on a large crowd-sourced image annotation dataset (e.g., ImageNet [9], Instagram [20] or JFT [21]), where the vocabulary of annotation texts is usually fixed. These image annotations are usually mapped into discrete class vectors to learn with a cross-entropy loss as
items.zh: 单编码器分类。经典的单编码器方法通过在大型众包图像标注数据集（例如ImageNet[9]、Instagram[20]或JFT[21]）上进行图像分类来预训练视觉编码器，其中标注文本的词汇表通常是固定的。这些图像标注通常映射为离散的类别向量，以使用交叉熵损失进行学习，如下所示：

items.en: where p​(y)𝑝𝑦p(y) is a one-hot, multi-hot or smoothed label distribution from ground truth label y𝑦y. The learned image encoder is then used as a generic visual representation extractor for downstream tasks.
items.zh: 其中p(y)是来自真实标签y的独热、多热或平滑标签分布。学习到的图像编码器随后用作下游任务的通用视觉表示提取器。

items.en: Dual-Encoder Contrastive Learning. Compared to pretraining with single-encoder classification, which requires human-annotated labels and data cleaning, the dual-encoder approach exploits noisy web-scale text descriptions and introduces a learnable text tower to encode free-form texts. The two encoders are jointly optimized by contrasting the paired text against others in the sampled batch:
items.zh: 双编码器对比学习。与需要人工标注标签和数据清洗的单编码器分类预训练相比，双编码器方法利用噪声网页规模文本描述，并引入可学习的文本塔来编码自由形式文本。两个编码器通过将配对文本与采样批次中的其他文本进行对比来联合优化：

items.en: where xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} and yjsubscript𝑦𝑗y_{j} are normalized embeddings of the image in the i𝑖i-th pair and that of the text in the j𝑗j-th pair. N𝑁N is the batch size, and σ𝜎\sigma is the temperature to scale the logits. In addition to the image encoder, the dual-encoder approach also learns an aligned text encoder that enables crossmodal alignment applications such as image-text retrieval and zero-shot image classification. Empirical evidence shows zero-shot classification is more robust [12, 13, 38] on corrupted or out-of-distribution images.
items.zh: 其中xi和yj分别是第i对图像和第j对文本的归一化嵌入。N是批次大小，σ是缩放logits的温度。除了图像编码器，双编码器方法还学习了一个对齐的文本编码器，支持跨模态对齐应用，如图像-文本检索和零样本图像分类。经验证据表明，零样本分类在损坏或分布外图像上更鲁棒[12,13,38]。

items.en: Encoder-Decoder Captioning. While the dual-encoder approach encodes the text as a whole, the generative approach (a.k.a. captioner) aims for detailed granularity and requires the model to predict the exact tokenized texts of y𝑦y autoregressively. Following a standard encoder-decoder architecture, the image encoder provides latent encoded features (e.g., using a Vision Transformer [39] or ConvNets [40]) and the text decoder learns to maximize the conditional likelihood of the paired text y𝑦y under the forward autoregressive factorization:
items.zh: 编码器-解码器描述。虽然双编码器方法将文本作为一个整体编码，但生成方法（也称为描述器）旨在实现细粒度，并要求模型以自回归方式预测y的精确分词文本。遵循标准编码器-解码器架构，图像编码器提供潜在编码特征（例如，使用Vision Transformer[39]或ConvNets[40]），文本解码器学习在前向自回归分解下最大化配对文本y的条件似然：

items.en: The encoder-decoder is trained with teacher-forcing [41] to parallelize computation and maximize learning efficiency. Unlike prior methods, the captioner approach yields a joint image-text representation that can be used for vision-language understanding, and is also capable of image captioning applications with natural language generation.
items.zh: 编码器-解码器使用教师强制[41]进行训练，以并行计算并最大化学习效率。与先前方法不同，描述器方法产生联合图像-文本表示，可用于视觉-语言理解，并且还能够通过自然语言生成进行图像描述应用。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Detailed illustration of CoCa architecture and training objectives.
items.capZh: 图2：CoCa架构和训练目标的详细说明。

items.en: where λConsubscript𝜆Con\lambda_{\text{Con}} and λCapsubscript𝜆Cap\lambda_{\text{Cap}} are loss weighting hyper-parameters. We note that the single-encoder cross-entropy classification objective can be interpreted as a special case of the generative approach applied on image annotation data, when the vocabulary is the set of all label names.
items.zh: 其中λCon和λCap是损失加权超参数。我们注意到，当词汇表是所有标签名称的集合时，单编码器交叉熵分类目标可以解释为生成方法在图像标注数据上的特例。

items.en: Decoupled Text Decoder and CoCa Architecture. The captioning approach optimizes the conditional likelihood of text while the contrastive approach uses an unconditional text representation. To address this dilemma and combine these two methods into a single model, we propose a simple decoupled decoder design where we split the decoder into unimodal and multimodal components, by skipping the cross-attention mechanism in the unimodal decoder layers. That is, the bottom nunisubscript𝑛unin_{\text{uni}} unimodal decoder layers encode the input text as latent vectors with causally-masked self-attention, and the top nmultisubscript𝑛multin_{\text{multi}} multimodal layers further apply causally-masked self-attention and together with cross-attention to the output of the visual encoder. All decoder layers prohibit tokens from attending to future tokens, and it is straightforward to use the multimodal text decoder output for the captioning objective ℒCapsubscriptℒCap\mathcal{L}_{\text{Cap}}. For the contrastive objective ℒConsubscriptℒCon\mathcal{L}_{\text{Con}}, we append a learnable [CLS] token at the end of the input sentence and use its corresponding output of unimodal decoder as the text embedding. We split the decoder in half such that nuni=nmultisubscript𝑛unisubscript𝑛multin_{\text{uni}}=n_{\text{multi}}. Following ALIGN [13], we pretrain with image resolution of 288×\times288 and patch size 18×\times18, resulting in a total of 256 image tokens. Our largest CoCa model ("CoCa" in short) follows the ViT-giant setup in [21] with 1B-parameters in the image encoder and 2.1B-parameters altogether with the text decoder. We also explore two smaller variants of “CoCa-Base” and “CoCa-Large” detailed in Table 1.
items.zh: 解耦文本解码器和CoCa架构。描述方法优化文本的条件似然，而对比方法使用无条件文本表示。为了解决这一困境并将这两种方法结合到单个模型中，我们提出了一种简单的解耦解码器设计，其中我们将解码器分为单模态和多模态组件，通过在单模态解码器层中跳过交叉注意力机制。也就是说，底部的nuni个单模态解码器层使用因果掩码自注意力将输入文本编码为潜在向量，顶部的nmulti个多模态层进一步应用因果掩码自注意力，并结合对视觉编码器输出的交叉注意力。所有解码器层禁止词元关注未来词元，并且可以直接使用多模态文本解码器输出用于描述目标ℒCap。对于对比目标ℒCon，我们在输入句子末尾附加一个可学习的[CLS]词元，并使用其在单模态解码器中的对应输出作为文本嵌入。我们将解码器对半分割，使得nuni=nmulti。遵循ALIGN[13]，我们使用图像分辨率288×288和补丁大小18×18进行预训练，总共产生256个图像词元。我们最大的CoCa模型（简称“CoCa”）遵循[21]中的ViT-giant设置，图像编码器有10亿参数，加上文本解码器总共21亿参数。我们还探索了两个较小的变体“CoCa-Base”和“CoCa-Large”，详见表1。

items.en: Attentional Poolers. It is noteworthy that the contrastive loss uses a single embedding for each image while the decoder usually attends to a sequence of image output tokens in an encoder-decoder captioner [16]. Our preliminary experiments show that a single pooled image embedding helps visual recognition tasks as a global representation, while more visual tokens (thus more fine-grained) are beneficial for multimodal understanding tasks which require region-level features. Hence, CoCa adopts task-specific attentional pooling [42] to customize visual representations to be used for different types of training objectives and downstream tasks. Here, a pooler is a single multi-head attention layer with nquerysubscript𝑛queryn_{\text{query}} learnable queries, with the encoder output as both keys and values. Through this, the model can learn to pool embeddings with different lengths for the two training objectives, as shown in Figure 2. The use of task-specific pooling not only addresses different needs for different tasks but also introduces the pooler as a natural task adapter. We use attentional poolers in pretraining for generative loss nquery=256subscript𝑛query256n_{\text{query}}=256 and contrastive loss nquery=1subscript𝑛query1n_{\text{query}}=1.
items.zh: 注意力池化器。值得注意的是，对比损失对每个图像使用单个嵌入，而解码器通常在编码器-解码器描述器[16]中关注图像输出词元序列。我们的初步实验表明，单个池化图像嵌入有助于视觉识别任务作为全局表示，而更多的视觉词元（因此更细粒度）有利于需要区域级特征的多模态理解任务。因此，CoCa采用任务特定的注意力池化[42]来定制用于不同类型训练目标和下游任务的视觉表示。这里，池化器是一个单多头注意力层，具有nquery个可学习查询，以编码器输出作为键和值。通过这种方式，模型可以学习为两个训练目标池化不同长度的嵌入，如图2所示。使用任务特定池化不仅解决了不同任务的不同需求，而且将池化器作为自然的任务适配器。我们在预训练中使用注意力池化器，生成损失使用nquery=256，对比损失使用nquery=1。

items.en: Pretraining Efficiency. A key benefit of the decoupled autoregressive decoder design is that it can compute two training losses considered efficiently. Since unidirectional language models are trained with causal masking on complete sentences, the decoder can efficiently generate outputs for both contrastive and generative losses with a single forward propagation (compared to two passes for a bidirectional approach [36]). Therefore, the majority of the compute is shared between the two losses and CoCa only induces minimal overhead compared to standard encoder-decoder models. On the other hand, while many existing methods [32, 33, 35, 30, 36, 37] train model components with multiple stages on various data sources and/or modalities, CoCa is pretrained end-to-end from scratch directly with various data sources (i.e., annotated images and noisy alt-text images) by treating all labels as texts for both contrastive and generative objectives.
items.zh: 预训练效率。解耦自回归解码器设计的一个关键优势是能够高效计算两种训练损失。由于单向语言模型在完整句子上使用因果掩码进行训练，解码器可以通过单次前向传播高效地为对比损失和生成损失生成输出（而双向方法需要两次前向传播[36]）。因此，大部分算力在两种损失之间共享，与标准的编码器-解码器模型相比，CoCa仅引入最小的额外开销。另一方面，虽然许多现有方法[32, 33, 35, 30, 36, 37]在不同数据源和/或模态上分阶段训练模型组件，但CoCa直接从零开始端到端预训练，使用各种数据源（即标注图像和带噪声的替代文本图像），通过将所有标签视为文本，同时用于对比和生成目标。

items.en: Zero-shot Transfer. A pretrained CoCa model performs many tasks in a zero-shot manner by leveraging both image and text inputs, including zero-shot image classification, zero-shot image-text cross-retrieval, zero-shot video-text cross-retrieval. Following previous practices [12, 32], “zero-shot” here is different from classical zero-shot learning in that during pretraining, the model may see relevant supervised information, but no supervised examples are used during the transfer protocol. For the pretraining data, we follow strict de-duplication procedures introduced in [13, 32] to filter all near-domain examples to our downstream tasks.
items.zh: 零样本迁移。预训练的CoCa模型通过利用图像和文本输入，以零样本方式执行许多任务，包括零样本图像分类、零样本图像-文本交叉检索、零样本视频-文本交叉检索。遵循先前实践[12, 32]，这里的“零样本”不同于经典零样本学习，因为在预训练期间，模型可能看到相关的监督信息，但在迁移协议中不使用任何监督示例。对于预训练数据，我们遵循[13, 32]中引入的严格去重程序，过滤掉所有与下游任务接近领域的样本。

items.en: Frozen-feature Evaluation. As discussed in the previous section, CoCa adopts task-specific attentional pooling [42] (pooler for brevity) to customize visual representations for different types downstream tasks while sharing the backbone encoder. This enables the model to obtain strong performance as a frozen encoder where we only learn a new pooler to aggregate features. It can also benefit to multi-task problems that share the same frozen image encoder computation but different task-specific heads. As also discussed in [23], linear-evaluation struggles to accurately measure learned representations and we find the attentional poolers are more practical for real-world applications.
items.zh: 冻结特征评估。如前一节所述，CoCa采用任务特定的注意力池化[42]（简称池化器）来为不同类型的下游任务定制视觉表示，同时共享骨干编码器。这使得模型在作为冻结编码器时获得强大性能，我们仅学习一个新的池化器来聚合特征。它也有利于多任务问题，这些任务共享相同的冻结图像编码器计算，但具有不同的任务特定头部。正如[23]中讨论的，线性评估难以准确衡量学习到的表示，我们发现注意力池化器在实际应用中更实用。

items.en: CoCa for Video Action Recognition. We use a simple approach to enable a learned CoCa model for video action recognition tasks. We first take multiple frames of a video and feed each frame into the shared image encoder individually as shown in Figure 3. For frozen-feature evaluation or finetuning, we learn an additional pooler on top of the spatial and temporal feature tokens with a softmax cross-entropy loss. Note the pooler has a single query token thus the computation of pooling over all spatial and temporal tokens is not expensive. For zero-shot video-text retrieval, we use an even simpler approach by computing the mean embedding of 16 frames of the video (frames are uniformly sampled from a video). We also encode the captions of each video as target embeddings when computing retrieval metrics.
items.zh: 用于视频动作识别的CoCa。我们使用一种简单的方法使学习到的CoCa模型适用于视频动作识别任务。我们首先获取视频的多个帧，并将每帧单独输入共享的图像编码器，如图3所示。对于冻结特征评估或微调，我们在空间和时间特征令牌之上学习一个额外的池化器，并使用softmax交叉熵损失。注意池化器只有一个查询令牌，因此对所有空间和时间令牌进行池化的计算并不昂贵。对于零样本视频-文本检索，我们使用更简单的方法，计算视频16帧的平均嵌入（帧从视频中均匀采样）。在计算检索指标时，我们还将每个视频的标题编码为目标嵌入。

items.en: In this section, we first describe the details of our experimental setup. The main results are presented next organized as visual recognition tasks, crossmodal alignment tasks, image captioning and multimodal understanding tasks. Our main results are conducted under three categories for downstream tasks: zero-shot transfer, frozen-feature evaluation and finetuning. We also present ablation experiments including training objectives and architecture designs.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们首先描述实验设置的细节。主要结果按视觉识别任务、跨模态对齐任务、图像描述和多模态理解任务组织。我们的主要结果在三种下游任务类别下进行：零样本迁移、冻结特征评估和微调。我们还提供了包括训练目标和架构设计的消融实验。

items.en: Data. As discussed in Section 3.2, CoCa is pretrained from scratch in a single stage on both web-scale alt-text data and annotated images by treating all labels simply as texts. We use the JFT-3B dataset [21] with label names as the paired texts, and the ALIGN dataset [13] with noisy alt-texts. Similar to [33], we randomly shuffle and concatenate label names of each image in JFT together with a prompt sampled from [12]. An example of the resulting text label of a JFT image would look like “a photo of the cat, animal”. Unlike prior models [32, 33] that also use the combination of these two datasets, we train all model parameters from scratch at the same time without pretraining an image encoder with supervised cross-entropy loss for simplicity and pretraining efficiency. To ensure fair evaluation, we follow the strict de-duplication procedures introduced in [32, 13] to filter all near-domain examples (3.6M images are removed in total) to our downstream tasks. To tokenize text input, we use a sentence-piece model [43, 44] with a vocabulary size of 64k trained on the sampled pretraining dataset.
items.zh: 数据。如第3.2节所述，CoCa在单阶段中从零开始预训练，使用网络规模的替代文本数据和标注图像，通过将所有标签简单地视为文本。我们使用JFT-3B数据集[21]（标签名称作为配对文本）和ALIGN数据集[13]（带噪声的替代文本）。与[33]类似，我们随机打乱并拼接JFT中每张图像的标签名称，并加上从[12]中采样的提示。JFT图像生成的文本标签示例为“a photo of the cat, animal”。与之前也使用这两个数据集组合的模型[32, 33]不同，我们同时从零开始训练所有模型参数，而不预先使用监督交叉熵损失训练图像编码器，以简化并提高预训练效率。为确保公平评估，我们遵循[32, 13]中引入的严格去重程序，过滤掉所有与下游任务接近领域的样本（共移除360万张图像）。为了对文本输入进行分词，我们使用句子片段模型[43, 44]，词汇量为64k，在采样的预训练数据集上训练。

items.en: Optimization. Our models are implemented in the Lingvo framework [45] with GSPMD [46, 47, 48, 49] for scaling performance. Following [33], we use a batch size of 65,536 image-text pairs, where half of each batch comes from JFT and ALIGN, respectively. All models are trained on the combined contrastive and captioning objectives in Eq.(4) for 500k steps, roughly corresponding to 5 epochs on JFT and 10 epochs on ALIGN. As shown later in our studies, we find a larger captioning loss weight is better and thus λCap=2.0subscript𝜆Cap2.0\lambda_{\text{Cap}}=2.0 and λCon=1.0subscript𝜆Con1.0\lambda_{\text{Con}}=1.0. Following [13], we apply a contrastive loss with a trainable temperature τ𝜏\tau with an initial value of 0.07. For memory efficiency, we use the Adafactor [50] optimizer with β1=0.9,β2=0.999formulae-sequencesubscript𝛽10.9subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{1}=0.9,\beta_{2}=0.999 and decoupled weight decay ratio of 0.01. We warm up the learning rate for the first 2% of training steps to a peak value of 8×10−48superscript1048\times 10^{-4}, and linearly decay it afterwards. Pretraining CoCa takes about 5 days on 2,048 CloudTPUv4 chips. Following [12, 13, 14], we continue pretraining for one epoch on a higher resolution of 576×\times576. For finetuning evaluation, we mainly follow simple protocols and directly train CoCa on downstream tasks without further metric-specific tuning like CIDEr scores (details in Appendix A and B).
items.zh: 优化。我们的模型在Lingvo框架[45]中实现，并使用GSPMD[46, 47, 48, 49]进行扩展性能。遵循[33]，我们使用65,536个图像-文本对的批量大小，其中每批的一半分别来自JFT和ALIGN。所有模型在组合的对比和描述目标（公式(4)）上训练500k步，大致对应JFT的5个epoch和ALIGN的10个epoch。如后续研究所示，我们发现更大的描述损失权重更好，因此λCap=2.0，λCon=1.0。遵循[13]，我们应用带有可训练温度τ的对比损失，初始值为0.07。为了内存效率，我们使用Adafactor[50]优化器，β1=0.9，β2=0.999，解耦权重衰减比为0.01。我们在训练步数的前2%将学习率预热到峰值8×10⁻⁴，然后线性衰减。预训练CoCa在2,048个CloudTPUv4芯片上大约需要5天。遵循[12, 13, 14]，我们在更高分辨率576×576上继续预训练一个epoch。对于微调评估，我们主要遵循简单协议，直接在下游任务上训练CoCa，而不进行进一步的指标特定调整，如CIDEr分数（详见附录A和B）。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Comparison of CoCa with other image-text foundation models (without task-specific customization) and multiple state-of-the-art task-specialized models.
items.capZh: 图4：CoCa与其他图像-文本基础模型（无任务特定定制）和多个最先进的任务专用模型的比较。

items.en: We extensively evaluate the capabilities of CoCa models on a wide range of downstream tasks as a pretrained foundation model. We mainly consider core tasks of three categories that examine (1) visual recognition, (2) crossmodal alignment, and (3) image captioning and multimodal understanding capabilities. Since CoCa produces both aligned unimodal representations and fused multimodal embeddings at the same time, it is easily transferable to all three task groups with minimal adaption. Figure 4 summarizes the performance on key benchmarks of CoCa compared to other dual-encoder and encoder-decoder foundation models and state-of-the-art task-specialized methods. CoCa sets new state-of-the-art results on tasks of all three categories with a single pretrained checkpoint.
items.zh: 我们广泛评估了CoCa模型作为预训练基础模型在广泛下游任务上的能力。我们主要考虑三类核心任务，分别考察（1）视觉识别，（2）跨模态对齐，以及（3）图像描述和多模态理解能力。由于CoCa同时生成对齐的单模态表示和融合的多模态嵌入，它可以轻松迁移到所有三个任务组，只需最小的适应。图4总结了CoCa在关键基准上的性能，与其他双编码器和编码器-解码器基础模型以及最先进的任务专用方法进行了比较。CoCa在单个预训练检查点上为所有三类任务设置了新的最先进结果。

items.en: Our visual recognition experiments are conducted on ImageNet [9] as image recognition benchmark, and multiple video datasets including Kinetics-400 [57], Kinetics-600 [58], Kinetics-700 [59], Moments-in-Time [60] as test-beds for video action recognition; it is noteworthy that CoCa pretrains on image data only, without accessing any extra video datasets. We apply the CoCa encoder on video frames individually (Section 3.3) without early fusion of temporal information, yet the resulting CoCa-for-Video model performs better than many spatio-temporal early-fused video models.
items.zh: 我们的视觉识别实验在ImageNet[9]上进行图像识别基准测试，并在多个视频数据集上进行视频动作识别测试，包括Kinetics-400[57]、Kinetics-600[58]、Kinetics-700[59]、Moments-in-Time[60]；值得注意的是，CoCa仅使用图像数据进行预训练，未访问任何额外的视频数据集。我们将CoCa编码器单独应用于视频帧（第3.3节），没有进行时间信息的早期融合，但由此产生的CoCa-for-Video模型在性能上优于许多时空早期融合的视频模型。

items.en: Frozen-feature. We apply a pretrained frozen CoCa model on both image classification and video action recognition. The encoder is used for both tasks while the decoder is discarded. As discussed in Section 3.3, an attentional pooling is learned together with a softmax cross-entropy loss layer on top of the embedding outputs from CoCa encoder. For video classification, a single query-token is learned to weight outputs of all tokens of spatial patches ×\times temporal frames. We set a learning rate of 5×10−45superscript1045\times 10^{-4} on both attentional pooler and softmax, batch size of 128, and a cosine learning rate schedule (details in Appendix A). For video action recognition, we compare CoCa with other approaches on the same setup (i.e., without extra supervised video data and without audio signals as model inputs). As shown in Table 2, without finetuning full encoder, CoCa already achieves competitive Top-1 classification accuracies compared to specialized image and outperforms prior state-of-the-art specialized methods on video tasks.
items.zh: 冻结特征。我们将预训练的冻结CoCa模型应用于图像分类和视频动作识别。编码器用于这两个任务，而解码器被丢弃。如第3.3节所述，在CoCa编码器的嵌入输出之上，学习一个注意力池化层和一个softmax交叉熵损失层。对于视频分类，学习一个单一查询令牌来加权所有空间块×时间帧令牌的输出。我们在注意力池化器和softmax上设置学习率为5×10⁻⁴，批量大小为128，并使用余弦学习率调度（详见附录A）。对于视频动作识别，我们在相同设置下将CoCa与其他方法进行比较（即没有额外的监督视频数据，也没有音频信号作为模型输入）。如表2所示，在不微调完整编码器的情况下，CoCa在Top-1分类准确率上已经达到与专用图像方法竞争的水平，并在视频任务上优于先前最先进的专用方法。

items.en: Finetuning. Based on the architecture of frozen-feature evaluation, we further finetune CoCa encoders on image and video datasets individually with a smaller learning rate of 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4}. More experimental details are summarized in the Appendix A. The finetuned CoCa has improved performance across these tasks. Notably, CoCa obtains new state-of-the-art 91.0% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, as well as better video action recognition results compared with recent video approaches. More importantly, CoCa models use much less parameters than other methods in the visual encoder as shown in Figure 5a. These results suggest the proposed framework efficiently combines text training signals and thus is able to learn high-quality visual representation better than the classical single-encoder approach.
items.zh: 微调。基于冻结特征评估的架构，我们进一步在图像和视频数据集上单独微调CoCa编码器，使用较小的学习率1×10⁻⁴。更多实验细节总结在附录A中。微调后的CoCa在这些任务上性能有所提升。值得注意的是，CoCa在ImageNet上获得了新的最先进91.0% Top-1准确率，并在视频动作识别结果上优于最近的视频方法。更重要的是，如图5a所示，CoCa模型在视觉编码器中使用的参数远少于其他方法。这些结果表明，所提出的框架有效地结合了文本训练信号，因此能够比经典的单编码器方法学习到更高质量的视觉表示。

items.en: Unlike other fusion-based foundation methods [16, 35, 17], CoCa is naturally applicable to crossmodal alignment tasks since it generates aligned image and text unimodal embeddings. In particular, we are interested in the zero-shot setting where all parameters are frozen after pretraining and directly used to extract embeddings. Here, we use the same embeddings used for contrastive loss during pretraining, and thus the multimodal text decoder is not used.
items.zh: 与其他基于融合的基础方法[16, 35, 17]不同，CoCa自然适用于跨模态对齐任务，因为它生成对齐的图像和文本单模态嵌入。我们特别关注零样本设置，其中所有参数在预训练后冻结，并直接用于提取嵌入。这里，我们使用预训练期间用于对比损失的相同嵌入，因此不使用多模态文本解码器。

items.en: Zero-Shot Image-Text Retrieval. We evaluate CoCa on the two standard image-text retrieval benchmarks: MSCOCO [63] and Flickr30K [62]. Following the CLIP setting [12], we first independently feed each image/text to the corresponding encoder and obtain embeddings for all image/text in the test set. We then retrieve based on cosine similarity scores over the whole test set. As shown in Table 3, CoCa significantly improves over prior methods on both image-to-text and text-to-image retrievals on all metrics. In addition, our model is parameter-efficient, with CoCa-Base already outperforming strong baselines (CLIP [12] and ALIGN [13]) and CoCa-Large outperforming Florence [14] (which contains a parameter count comparable to ViT-Huge). This shows that CoCa learns good unimodal representations and aligns them well across modalities.
items.zh: 零样本图像-文本检索。我们在两个标准图像-文本检索基准上评估CoCa：MSCOCO[63]和Flickr30K[62]。遵循CLIP设置[12]，我们首先独立地将每张图像/每个文本输入到相应的编码器，并获得测试集中所有图像/文本的嵌入。然后基于整个测试集上的余弦相似度分数进行检索。如表3所示，CoCa在所有指标上显著优于先前方法，包括图像到文本和文本到图像检索。此外，我们的模型参数高效，CoCa-Base已经优于强基线（CLIP[12]和ALIGN[13]），CoCa-Large优于Florence[14]（其参数数量与ViT-Huge相当）。这表明CoCa学习了良好的单模态表示，并在模态间很好地对齐了它们。

items.en: Zero-Shot Image Classification. Following prior work [12, 13], we use the aligned image/text embeddings to perform zero-shot image classification by matching images with label names without finetuning. We follow the exact setup in [12] and apply the same set of prompts used for label class names. As shown in Table 4, CoCa sets new state-of-the-art zero-shot classification results on ImageNet. Notably, CoCa uses fewer parameters than prior best model [33] while smaller CoCa variants already outperform strong baselines [12, 14], as shown in Figure 5b. In addition, our model demonstrates effective generalization under zero-shot evaluation, consistent with prior findings [12, 13], with CoCa improving on all six datasets considered. Lastly, while prior models [32, 33] found sequentially pretraining with single-encoder and dual-encoder methods in multiple stages is crucial to performance gains, our results show it is possible to attain strong performance by unifying training objectives and datasets in a single-stage framework.
items.zh: 零样本图像分类。遵循先前工作[12, 13]，我们使用对齐的图像/文本嵌入，通过将图像与标签名称匹配来执行零样本图像分类，无需微调。我们遵循[12]中的确切设置，并应用与标签类别名称相同的提示集。如表4所示，CoCa在ImageNet上设置了新的最先进零样本分类结果。值得注意的是，CoCa使用的参数少于先前最佳模型[33]，而较小的CoCa变体已经优于强基线[12, 14]，如图5b所示。此外，我们的模型在零样本评估下展示了有效的泛化能力，与先前发现[12, 13]一致，CoCa在所有六个考虑的数据集上都有改进。最后，虽然先前模型[32, 33]发现使用单编码器和双编码器方法分阶段顺序预训练对性能提升至关重要，但我们的结果表明，通过统一训练目标和数据集，在单阶段框架中实现强性能是可能的。

items.en: Zero-Shot Video Retrieval. We evaluate video-text retrieval using CoCa on MSR-VTT [71] using the full split. Table 5 shows that CoCa produces the highest retrieval metrics for both text-to-video and video-to-text retrieval. It is important to note that MSR-VTT videos are sourced from YouTube, and we require the original videos to compute our embeddings. Many of the videos have been made explicitly unavailable [72], hence we compute retrieval over the subset of data that is publicly available at the time of evaluation. Using code222https://socraticmodels.github.io provided by the authors of Socratic Models [70], we re-computed metrics on the available subset for those methods, indicated by “(subset)” for fairest comparison.
items.zh: 零样本视频检索。我们使用CoCa在MSR-VTT[71]上评估视频-文本检索，使用完整划分。表5显示，CoCa在文本到视频和视频到文本检索中均产生了最高的检索指标。需要注意的是，MSR-VTT视频来自YouTube，我们需要原始视频来计算嵌入。许多视频已被明确设为不可用[72]，因此我们在评估时公开可用的数据子集上计算检索。使用Socratic Models[70]作者提供的代码²，我们重新计算了这些方法在可用子集上的指标，用“(subset)”表示，以进行最公平的比较。

items.en: Another key advantage of CoCa is its ability to process multimodal embeddings as an encoder-decoder model trained with the generative objective. Therefore, CoCa can perform both image captioning and multimodal understanding downstream tasks without any further fusion adaptation [73, 74]. Overall, experimental results suggest CoCa reaps the benefit of a encoder-decoder model to obtain strong multimodal understanding and generation capabilities, in addition to the vision and retrieval capabilities as a dual-encoder method.
items.zh: CoCa的另一个关键优势是它能够作为编码器-解码器模型处理多模态嵌入，该模型使用生成目标进行训练。因此，CoCa可以执行图像描述和多模态理解下游任务，无需进一步的融合适应[73, 74]。总体而言，实验结果表明，CoCa受益于编码器-解码器模型，获得了强大的多模态理解和生成能力，同时作为双编码器方法还具备视觉和检索能力。

items.en: Multimodal Understanding. As shown in [16], the output of encoder-decoder models can jointly encode image and text inputs, and can be used for tasks that require reasoning over both modalities. We consider three popular multimodal understaning benchmarks: visual question answering (VQA v2 [75]), visual entailment (SNLI-VE [76]), and visual reasoning (NLVR2 [77]). We mainly follow the settings in [16] and train linear classifiers on top of the decoder outputs to predict answers (more details in Appendix B). Our results in Table 6 suggest that CoCa outperforms strong vision-language pretraining (VLP) baselines and obtains state-of-the-art performance on all three tasks. While prior dual-encoder models [12, 14] do not contain fusion layers and thus require an additional VL pretraining stage for downstream multimodal understanding tasks, CoCa subsumes the three pretraining paradigms and obtains better performance on VL tasks with lightweight finetuning.
items.zh: 多模态理解。如[16]所示，编码器-解码器模型的输出可以联合编码图像和文本输入，并可用于需要跨两种模态进行推理的任务。我们考虑了三个流行的多模态理解基准：视觉问答（VQA v2 [75]）、视觉蕴含（SNLI-VE [76]）和视觉推理（NLVR2 [77]）。我们主要遵循[16]中的设置，在解码器输出之上训练线性分类器来预测答案（更多细节见附录B）。我们在表6中的结果表明，CoCa优于强大的视觉-语言预训练（VLP）基线，并在所有三个任务上取得了最先进的性能。虽然先前的双编码器模型[12, 14]不包含融合层，因此需要额外的视觉-语言预训练阶段来处理下游多模态理解任务，但CoCa包含了三种预训练范式，并通过轻量级微调在视觉-语言任务上获得了更好的性能。

items.en: Image Captioning. In addition to multimodal classification tasks, CoCa is also directly applicable to image captioning tasks as an encoder-decoder model. We finetune CoCa with the captioning loss ℒCapsubscriptℒCap\mathcal{L}_{\text{Cap}} only on MSCOCO [63] captioning task and evaluate on both MSCOCO Karpathy-test split and NoCaps [78] online evaluation. As shown by experiments in Table 7, CoCa outperforms strong baselines trained with cross-entropy loss on MSCOCO, and achieves results comparable to methods with CIDEr metric-specific optimization [79]. It is noteworthy that we do not use CIDEr-specific optimization [79] for simplicity. On the challenging NoCaps benchmark, CoCa obtains new state-of-the-art on both validation and test splits (generated examples shown in Figure 6). These results showcase the generative capability of CoCa as an image-text foundation model.
items.zh: 图像描述。除了多模态分类任务外，CoCa作为编码器-解码器模型也直接适用于图像描述任务。我们仅在MSCOCO [63]描述任务上使用描述损失ℒCap微调CoCa，并在MSCOCO Karpathy测试集和NoCaps [78]在线评估上进行评估。如表7中的实验所示，CoCa在MSCOCO上优于使用交叉熵损失训练的强基线，并取得了与使用CIDEr指标特定优化[79]的方法相当的结果。值得注意的是，为简单起见，我们没有使用CIDEr特定优化[79]。在具有挑战性的NoCaps基准上，CoCa在验证集和测试集上都取得了新的最先进结果（生成的示例如图6所示）。这些结果展示了CoCa作为图像-文本基础模型的生成能力。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Curated samples of text captions generated by CoCa with NoCaps images as input.
items.capZh: 图6：CoCa以NoCaps图像为输入生成的文本描述精选样本。

items.en: We extensively ablate the properties of CoCa on a smaller model variant. Specifically, we train CoCa-Base with a reduced 12 decoder layers and a total batch size of 4,096. We mainly evaluate using zero-shot image classification and VQA, since the former covers both visual representation quality and crossmodal alignment, while the later is representative for multimodal reasoning.
items.zh: 我们在较小的模型变体上广泛消融了CoCa的特性。具体来说，我们训练了CoCa-Base，其解码器层数减少到12层，总批大小为4,096。我们主要使用零样本图像分类和VQA进行评估，因为前者涵盖了视觉表示质量和跨模态对齐，而后者代表了多模态推理。

items.en: Captioning vs. Classification. We first examine the effectiveness of captioning loss on image annotation datasets. To do this, we train a naive encoder-decoder model using ℒCapsubscriptℒCap\mathcal{L}_{\text{Cap}} on the JFT-3B dataset, and compare with a standard ViT-Base single-encoder model trained with ℒClssubscriptℒCls\mathcal{L}_{\text{Cls}} in Table 8a. We find encoder-decoder models to perform on par with single-encoder pretraining on both linear evaluation and finetuned results. This suggests that the generative pretraining subsumes classification pretraining, consistent with our intuition that ℒClssubscriptℒCls\mathcal{L}_{\text{Cls}} is a special case of ℒCapsubscriptℒCap\mathcal{L}_{\text{Cap}} when text vocabulary is the set of all possible class names. Thus, our CoCa model can be interpreted as an effective unification of the three paradigms. This explains why CoCa does not need a pretrained visual encoder to perform well.
items.zh: 描述 vs. 分类。我们首先研究了描述损失在图像标注数据集上的有效性。为此，我们在JFT-3B数据集上使用ℒCap训练了一个朴素的编码器-解码器模型，并与使用ℒCls训练的标准ViT-Base单编码器模型在表8a中进行了比较。我们发现编码器-解码器模型在线性评估和微调结果上与单编码器预训练表现相当。这表明生成式预训练包含了分类预训练，这与我们的直觉一致，即当文本词汇表是所有可能类别名称的集合时，ℒCls是ℒCap的一个特例。因此，我们的CoCa模型可以解释为三种范式的有效统一。这解释了为什么CoCa不需要预训练的视觉编码器也能表现良好。

items.en: Training Objectives. We study the effects of the two training objectives and compare CoCa with single-objective variants in Table 8b. Compared to the contrastive-only model, CoCa significantly improves both zero-shot alignment and VQA (notice that the contrastive-only model requires additional fusion for VQA). CoCa performs on par with the captioning-only model on VQA while it additionally enables retrieval-style tasks such as zero-shot classification. Table 8c further studies loss ratios and suggests that the captioning loss not only improves VQA but also zero-shot alignment between modalities. We hypothesize that generative objectives learn fine-grained text representations that further improve text understanding. Finally, we compare training costs in Table 8b (measured in TPUv3-core-days; larger is slower) and find CoCa to be as efficient as the captioning-only model (a.k.a.naive encoder-decoder) due to the sharing of compute between two objectives. These suggest combining the two losses induces new capabilities and better performance with minimal extra cost.
items.zh: 训练目标。我们研究了两个训练目标的效果，并在表8b中将CoCa与单目标变体进行了比较。与仅对比学习模型相比，CoCa显著提高了零样本对齐和VQA（注意，仅对比学习模型需要额外的融合才能用于VQA）。CoCa在VQA上与仅描述模型表现相当，同时额外支持检索类任务，如零样本分类。表8c进一步研究了损失比率，表明描述损失不仅提高了VQA，还提高了模态间的零样本对齐。我们假设生成式目标学习了细粒度的文本表示，从而进一步提高了文本理解。最后，我们在表8b中比较了训练成本（以TPUv3核心天为单位；数值越大表示越慢），发现CoCa与仅描述模型（即朴素编码器-解码器）一样高效，因为两个目标共享计算。这表明结合两种损失可以以最小的额外成本带来新的能力和更好的性能。

items.en: Unimodal and Multimodal Decoders. CoCa introduces a novel decoder design and we ablate its components. In Table 8d, we vary the number of unimodal decoder layers (while keeping the total number of layers the same). Intuitively, fewer unimodal text layers leads to worse zero-shot classification due to lack of capacity for good unimodal text understanding, while fewer multimodal layers reduces the model’s power to reason over multimodal inputs such as VQA. Overall, we find decoupling the decoder in half maintains a good balance. One possibility is that global text representation for retrieval doesn’t require deep modules [33] while early fusion for shallow layers may also be unnecessary for multimodal understanding. Next, we explore various options to extract unimodal text embeddings. In particular, we experiment with the number of learnable [CLS] tokens as well as the aggregation design. For the later, we aggregate over either the [CLS] tokens only or the concatenation of [CLS] and the original input sentence. Interestingly, in Table 8e we find training a single [CLS] token without the original input is preferred for both vision-only and crossmodal retrieval tasks. This indicates that learning an additional simple sentence representation mitigates interference between contrastive and captioning loss, and is powerful enough for strong generalization.
items.zh: 单模态和多模态解码器。CoCa引入了一种新颖的解码器设计，我们对其组件进行了消融。在表8d中，我们改变了单模态解码器层的数量（同时保持总层数不变）。直观上，较少的单模态文本层会导致较差的零样本分类，因为缺乏良好的单模态文本理解能力，而较少的单模态层会降低模型对多模态输入（如VQA）进行推理的能力。总体而言，我们发现将解码器对半分割能保持良好的平衡。一种可能性是，用于检索的全局文本表示不需要深层模块[33]，而浅层的早期融合对于多模态理解也可能是不必要的。接下来，我们探索了提取单模态文本嵌入的各种选项。具体来说，我们实验了可学习[CLS]标记的数量以及聚合设计。对于后者，我们仅聚合[CLS]标记，或聚合[CLS]与原始输入句子的拼接。有趣的是，在表8e中，我们发现对于纯视觉和跨模态检索任务，训练单个[CLS]标记而不使用原始输入是更优的。这表明学习一个额外的简单句子表示减轻了对比损失和描述损失之间的干扰，并且足以实现强大的泛化。

items.en: Attentional Poolers. CoCa exploits attentional poolers in its design both for different pretraining objectives and objective-specific downstream task adaptations. In pretraining, we compare a few design variants on using poolers for contrastive loss and generative loss: (1) the “parallel” design which extracts both contrastive and generative losses at the same time on Vision Transformer encoder outputs as shown in Figure 2, and (2) the “cascade” design which applies the contrastive pooler on top of the outputs of the generative pooler. Table 8f shows the results of these variants. Empirically, we find at small scale the “cascade” version (contrastive pooler on top of the generative pooler) performs better and is used by default in all CoCa models. We also study the effect of number of queries where nquery=0subscript𝑛query0n_{\text{query}}=0 means no generative pooler is used (thus all ViT output tokens are used for decoder cross-attention). Results show that both tasks prefer longer sequences of detailed image tokens at a cost of slightly more computation and parameters. As a result, we use a generative pooler of length 256 to improve multimodal understanding benchmarks while still maintaining the strong frozen-feature capability.
items.zh: 注意力池化器。CoCa在其设计中利用了注意力池化器，既用于不同的预训练目标，也用于特定目标的下游任务适配。在预训练中，我们比较了使用池化器进行对比损失和生成损失的几种设计变体：（1）“并行”设计，如图2所示，同时在Vision Transformer编码器输出上提取对比损失和生成损失；（2）“级联”设计，在生成池化器的输出之上应用对比池化器。表8f显示了这些变体的结果。根据经验，我们发现小规模下“级联”版本（对比池化器在生成池化器之上）表现更好，并被默认用于所有CoCa模型。我们还研究了查询数量的影响，其中nquery=0表示不使用生成池化器（因此所有ViT输出标记都用于解码器交叉注意力）。结果表明，两个任务都偏好更长的详细图像标记序列，代价是略微增加计算量和参数量。因此，我们使用长度为256的生成池化器来改进多模态理解基准，同时保持强大的冻结特征能力。

items.en: This work presents an image-text pretraining approach on web-scale datasets that is capable of transferring to a wide range of downstream tasks in a zero-shot manner or with lightweight finetuning. While the pretrained models are capable of many vision and vision-language tasks, we note that our models use the same pretraining data as previous methods [13, 21, 32, 33] and additional analysis of the data and the resulting model is necessary before the use of the models in practice. We show CoCa models are more robust on corrupted images, but it could still be vulnerable to other image corruptions that are not yet captured by current evaluation sets or in real-world scenarios. For both the data and model, further community exploration is required to understand the broader impacts including but not limited to fairness, social bias and potential misuse.
items.zh: 这项工作提出了一种基于网络规模数据集的图像-文本预训练方法，能够以零样本方式或通过轻量级微调迁移到广泛的下游任务。虽然预训练模型能够处理许多视觉和视觉-语言任务，但我们注意到我们的模型使用了与先前方法[13, 21, 32, 33]相同的预训练数据，在实际使用模型之前，需要对数据和结果模型进行进一步分析。我们展示了CoCa模型在损坏图像上更具鲁棒性，但它可能仍然容易受到当前评估集或现实场景中尚未捕获的其他图像损坏的影响。对于数据和模型，都需要进一步的社区探索以理解更广泛的影响，包括但不限于公平性、社会偏见和潜在滥用。

items.en: In this work we present Contrastive Captioners (CoCa), a new image-text foundation model family that subsumes existing vision pretraining paradigms with natural language supervision. Pretrained on image-text pairs from various data sources in a single stage, CoCa efficiently combines contrastive and captioning objectives in an encoder-decoder model. CoCa obtains a series of state-of-the-art performance with a single checkpoint on a wide spectrum of vision and vision-language problems. Our work bridges the gap among various pretraining approaches and we hope it motivates new directions for image-text foundation models.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了对比描述器（CoCa），这是一个新的图像-文本基础模型系列，它包含了现有的具有自然语言监督的视觉预训练范式。CoCa在单阶段中从各种数据源的图像-文本对进行预训练，在编码器-解码器模型中高效地结合了对比和描述目标。CoCa在广泛的视觉和视觉-语言问题上使用单个检查点取得了一系列最先进的性能。我们的工作弥合了各种预训练方法之间的差距，我们希望它能激发图像-文本基础模型的新方向。
